name: RingCentral UCaaS & CPaaS API
what_it_does: RingCentral API for unified communications — voice calls, SMS/MMS, team messaging, video meetings, and fax. Enterprise UCaaS and CPaaS platform enabling AI agents to query call logs, send messages, manage users, access voicemail, and integrate with contact center workflows.
use_cases: Querying call logs and analytics from business communications reporting agents
Sending SMS notifications and alerts from customer communication automation agents
Managing voicemail and call recordings from customer service automation agents
Integrating RingCentral with CRM systems from sales workflow automation agents
not_for: High-volume A2P SMS without proper verification (requires compliance review)
best_when: An enterprise using RingCentral for business phone wants AI agents to automate communications workflows — logging calls, sending notifications, and integrating with CRM and ticketing systems.
avoid_when: You need outbound calling at scale without compliance review. PRIVACY: Call recordings and voicemail contain sensitive business communications.

auth.notes: RingCentral OAuth 2.0 with JWT and auth code flows. Developer account required. Production apps require RingCentral review. Sandbox available for testing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: RingCentral developer sandbox free; production requires RingCentral subscription
pricing.notes: Developer sandbox is free. Production use requires RingCentral subscription. API included in all plans.

performance.rate_limits: RingCentral API: 40 requests/minute per app for most endpoints; higher for enterprise

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Call recordings and voicemail contain sensitive business communications
Production app requires RingCentral review before going live
No public MCP server — REST API or SDK integration required
Rate limits vary by endpoint — message sending has stricter limits
RingCentral phone numbers must be E.164 format for all operations
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Business call recordings, voicemail, and messaging data. SOC2, HIPAA-eligible, ISO27001. OAuth required. Enterprise compliance posture.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise UCaaS with sensitive call recordings and business communications. SOC2, HIPAA, ISO27001. Strong auth and compliance posture.
